answer: A user can access the 1M token context window without a beta header when using Claude Opus 4.6 or Sonnet 4.6. If they attempt to use it with Claude Sonnet 4.5 after April 30, 2026, requests that exceed the standard 200k-token context window will return an error.
US-only inference is available at 1.1x pricing for models released after February 1, 2026.
Claude Opus 4.6 and Claude Sonnet 4.6 support the 1M token context window at standard pricing without a beta header. Both models are currently available for use.
All requests to the Claude Haiku 3 model will return an error. Anthropic recommends upgrading to Claude Haiku 4.5.
